description: Vertical Department of Labor slogan graphic combining a photo and large-type statistic. The top half is a color photograph of President Trump speaking into a microphone, shown from the chest up against a dark blue, softly bokeh-lit background; he wears a dark suit and light blue tie. The bottom half is a dark navy field carrying a very large white serif '100%' followed by an italic white serif line 'of job gains have gone to' and, in a bold white sans-serif on a blue highlight bar, 'NATIVE-BORN WORKERS.' A small white DOL eagle emblem is centered at the very bottom. The accompanying tweet text includes 'AMERICANS FIRST'.
notable_text: 100% of job gains have gone to NATIVE-BORN WORKERS (tweet adds: AMERICANS FIRST)
